answer:
**The poem "Abdul Qadir Ke Naam" (Chapter 8 of *Bang-E-Dara Part 2*) is explicitly addressed to Abdul Qadir**, as indicated by its title ("Ke Naam" meaning "to the name of" or "addressed to" in Urdu).[^1]

The addressee is urged to **arise amid encroaching darkness on the Eastern horizon** and, together with the poet, take bold, transformative actions: illuminate and upend the assembly with fiery eloquence and tumultuous cries; reveal love's burnishing power and forge "the stone of Today into the mirror of Tomorrow"; evoke the vision of the lost Joseph to inspire intense yearning; teach the garden the law of growth, turning dewdrops into oceans; elevate souls beyond the "idol-house of Cathay" toward visions like Sa'di's and Salma's; awaken Qais to a higher longing than for Layla; melt hearts with warm vintage wine; expose the inner "brand" kept warm in the West; and live like a candle—burning self to teach and illuminate strangers' eyes.[^2][^3]

[^1]: Allama Iqbal, *Bang-E-Dara Part 2*, ch. 8 "Abdul Qadir Ke Naam" ([/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/](works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/)).

[^2]: Ibid., [p-65bf0c](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-65bf0c) ("Arise, for darkness now spills..."); [p-8267f4](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-8267f4); [p-5af4c1](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-5af4c1).

[^3]: Ibid., [p-3492d1](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-3492d1); [p-e5a010](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-e5a010); [p-93bf82](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-93bf82); [p-1bd2b4](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-1bd2b4); [p-81c682](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-81c682); [p-286722](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-286722); [p-a9cfaf](/works/allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-2-9bc58c/08-abdul-qadir-ke-naam/translation/#p-a9cfaf).
